ddls:
CREATE TABLE "button_styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each button style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the button style (e.g., Primary, Secondary) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the button style */,
  "css_class" TEXT /* CSS class used to apply the button style */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the style is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the style was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the style */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the style */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the style */,
  "supports_hover" INTEGER /* Indicates if the style supports hover effects */,
  "supports_focus" INTEGER /* Indicates if the style supports focus effects */,
  "supports_disabled" INTEGER /* Indicates if the style supports disabled states */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "button_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each button size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the button size (e.g., Normal, Large) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the button size */,
  "css_class" TEXT /* CSS class used to apply the button size */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the size */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the size */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the size */,
  "min_width" INTEGER /* Minimum width of the button size */,
  "max_width" INTEGER /* Maximum width of the button size */,
  "min_height" INTEGER /* Minimum height of the button size */,
  "max_height" INTEGER /* Maximum height of the button size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "button_states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each button state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the button state (e.g., Default, Hover, Focus, Disabled) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the button state */,
  "css_class" TEXT /* CSS class used to apply the button state */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the state is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the state was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the state */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the state */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "button_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user interaction */,
  "button_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the button that was interacted with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who interacted with the button */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., Click, Hover, Focus) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the interaction occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., Desktop, Mobile, Tablet) */,
  "screen_size" TEXT /* Screen size of the device used (e.g., 1920x1080, 320x568) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_button_interactions_button_id FOREIGN KEY ("button_id") REFERENCES buttons ("button_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buttons" (
  "button_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each button */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the button style */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the button size */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the button state */,
  "button_text" TEXT /* Text displayed on the button */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL the button links to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the button was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the button */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the button */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the button */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("button_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buttons_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES button_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buttons_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES button_styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buttons_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES button_states ("state_id")
)
